leadText: The Surge Badge (Japanese: だいだいバッジ Orange Badge) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII. It is a novelty item that can be obtained in the Kantonian Gym in Malie City by defeating its leader. It appears to be based on the Vermilion Gym's Thunder Badge and named after its Gym Leader.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Surge Badge serves no practical purpose.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method US UM Kantonian Gym (from the Kantonian Gym Leader after defeating him)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A novelty badge that you can receive at the Kantonian Gym. Rumor has it that it imitates the Badge of a Gym somewhere.
